title: Your Insurer Is Practicing Medicine Without a License
description: Health insurers routinely override physician prescriptions through 'step therapy' — forcing patients with chronic inflammatory diseases to fail on cheaper drugs before accessing the one their doctor actually wants them on. The harm isn't theoretical: ongoing inflammation causes irreversible joint, tissue, and organ damage during the delay. This piece examines the evidence for patient harm, the financial logic driving the policy, and why 30+ state legislatures have decided the practice crosses a line.
